bridge_equation_v32.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v32 = mix(B_plastic_v31, L_zone, 1 - P_zone, D_feature_v26, 1 - G_brain_v26)
bridge_equation_v32.structure_term: B_struct_v32 = mix(B_struct_v31, S_zone, R_zone, 1 - P_zone, D_structure_v26)
bridge_equation_v32.readiness_term: R_train_v32 = mix(R_train_v31, B_plastic_v32, B_struct_v32, R_zone, D_align_v26, 1 - P_zone)

project_readout.summary: training bridge v32 checks whether the low-risk steady zone starts shrinking rule-layer risk in a more stable way.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this low-risk zone still survives after it is folded back into the next closed-form core.
